title: ComCare Assistance
text:
ComCare Assistance - SupportGoWhere
ComCare Assistance
Share link
Provides financial support for individuals and families facing varied adversities, ensuring timely aid for both short-term and long-term needs.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Cash assistance for low-income individuals or families for long-term or short-term needs
Assistance for household and medical expenses
Provides other support such as employment assistance or social support services
Collapse all sections
About this support

ComCare Interim Assistance   

Provides urgent and temporary financial assistance for lower-income individuals or families.   

ComCare Short-to-Medium-Term Assistance (SMTA) 
Provides temporary financial assistance for lower-income individuals or families who are temporarily unable to work, seeking a job or earning a low income. 

ComCare Long Term Assistance (LTA) 
Provides long-term assistance to individuals or families who are permanently unable to work  due to age, illness, or disability with inadequate family support or savings.

Who is this for?

You must be a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident (at least one member in the same household must be a Singapore Citizen) 

Households with a monthly household income per capita of $800 and below 

How to apply?

Please click on the links to the respective schemes above to find out how to apply. 

Where can I find help?

View more details

ComCare Hotline: 1800 222 0000

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Ask_SSO@msf.gov.sg

Visit your nearest Social Service Office

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
